name: Warrior of Shadow
desc: Monks of shadow and silence — G’s teaching, Roman’s trick. (Paraphrased homebrew import of the 2024 subclass; SRD 5.2 only ships Open Hand.)

features.name: Shadow Arts
features.desc: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. Spend 1 Focus Point to cast Darkness (no components); you can see within it, and can move its area at the start of your turns. You also gain Darkvision 60 ft (or +60 ft).

features.name: Shadow Step
features.desc: While in Dim Light or Darkness, as a Bonus Action teleport up to 60 feet to another space in Dim Light or Darkness; your next melee attack before the end of the turn has Advantage.

features.name: Improved Shadow Step
features.desc: Spend 1 Focus Point to remove the light requirement on either end of your Shadow Step, and make an Unarmed Strike as part of the same Bonus Action.

features.name: Cloak of Shadows
features.desc: As a Magic action in Dim Light or Darkness, spend 3 Focus Points to become Invisible for 1 minute (while conscious): you partially phase, gaining resistance to all damage except Force, Psychic, and Radiant, and can move through occupied spaces.

name: Diviner (Divination Wizard)
desc: A wizard who reads the branching futures — Varen’s portent as rules text. (Paraphrased homebrew import; SRD 5.2 only ships Evoker.)

features.name: Divination Savant
features.desc: Adding a Divination spell to your spellbook costs half the usual gold and time; you gain two free Divination spells for your book at this level and more as you level.

features.name: Portent
features.desc: After a Long Rest, roll two d20s and record them. Before any creature you can see makes a d20 Test, you can replace their roll with one of these foretelling rolls (once per turn). Each roll is used once; unused rolls are lost at your next Long Rest.

features.name: Expert Divination
features.desc: When you cast a Divination spell of level 2+ using a spell slot, you regain an expended slot of a lower level (max level 5).

features.name: The Third Eye
features.desc: As a Bonus Action (once per Short/Long Rest), gain one until you rest: Darkvision 120 ft, see into the Ethereal Plane within 60 ft, or read any language.

features.name: Greater Portent
features.desc: Your Portent gives three foretelling rolls instead of two.

name: Oath of Glory
desc: Paladins who believe they and their companions are destined for legend — Eddy's oath. (Paraphrased homebrew import; SRD 5.2 only ships Devotion.)

features.name: Oath of Glory Spells
features.desc: Always prepared: Guiding Bolt, Heroism (3rd); Enhance Ability, Magic Weapon (5th); Haste, Protection from Energy (9th); Compulsion, Freedom of Movement (13th); Legend Lore, Yolande's Regal Presence (17th).

features.name: Peerless Athlete
features.desc: As a Bonus Action, expend a use of Channel Divinity to gain a surge of athleticism for 1 hour: Advantage on Strength (Athletics) and Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks, and your long and high jumps are 10 feet longer (extra distance costs movement as normal).

features.name: Inspiring Smite
features.desc: Immediately after you deal damage with Divine Smite, use Channel Divinity as a Bonus Action to scatter 2d8 + your Paladin level Temporary Hit Points among creatures of your choice (you included) within 30 feet.

features.name: Aura of Alacrity
features.desc: Your Speed increases by 10 feet, and allies who start their turn in your aura gain +10 feet Speed until the end of that turn.

features.name: Glorious Defense
features.desc: As a Reaction when you or a creature you can see within 10 feet is hit by an attack roll, add your Charisma modifier to the target's AC against that attack; if the attack now misses and the attacker is within your weapon's range, you can make one attack against it as part of the same Reaction. Uses = Charisma modifier (min 1) per Long Rest.

features.name: Living Legend
features.desc: As a Bonus Action (1/Long Rest, or expend a level 5 spell slot), for 10 minutes: Advantage on Charisma checks, once per turn turn a missed weapon attack into a hit, and rerolls on failed saving throws (once per turn).

name: Light Domain
desc: Clerics of fire, sun, and revelation — Brolin's domain (2014 rules text paraphrased; SRD 5.2 only ships Life).

features.name: Bonus Cantrip
features.desc: You know the Light cantrip (doesn't count against your cantrips known).

features.name: Warding Flare
features.desc: When attacked by a creature you can see within 30 feet, use your Reaction to impose Disadvantage on the attack roll. Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1) per Long Rest.

features.name: Domain Spells
features.desc: Always prepared: Burning Hands, Faerie Fire (1st); Flaming Sphere, Scorching Ray (3rd); Daylight, Fireball (5th); Guardian of Faith, Wall of Fire (7th); Flame Strike, Scrying (9th).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn
features.desc: As an action, present your holy symbol to dispel magical darkness within 30 feet; each hostile creature within 30 feet (without total cover) makes a Constitution save or takes 2d10 + cleric level Radiant damage (half on success).

features.name: Improved Flare
features.desc: Your Warding Flare can also protect other creatures you can see within 30 feet.

features.name: Potent Spellcasting
features.desc: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage of your cleric cantrips.

features.name: Corona of Light
features.desc: As an action, radiate sunlight for 1 minute (60-ft bright light); enemies in the bright light have Disadvantage on saves against spells that deal Fire or Radiant damage.
